content.text:
Based on the zoomed-in view of atom 15 (C), I can identify the following covalently connected neighbor atoms:

**Neighbor atoms of atom index 15:**
| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 7 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 12 | C (Carbon) |
| 16 | C (Carbon) |
| 20 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index:** 9179

The central carbon atom (C:15) is bonded to one nitrogen atom, two carbon atoms, and one hydrogen atom, giving it a tetrahedral geometry typical of sp³ hybridized carbon.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 15 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
